en.title: Analytics Dashboard
en.previewText: An interactive dashboard for monitoring key business metrics with real-time data streaming and customizable charts.

es.title: Analytics Dashboard
es.previewText: Un dashboard interactivo para monitorear metricas clave con datos en tiempo real y graficos configurables.
es.imageAlt: Vista previa de un dashboard analitico

en.title: Analytics Dashboard
en.subtitle: A data-rich dashboard built to make complex metrics easier to understand and act on.
paragraphs: This case study focuses on a dashboard experience designed to turn live operational data into something clear, useful, and actionable.

es.title: Analytics Dashboard
es.subtitle: Un dashboard orientado a datos para volver metricas complejas mas claras y accionables.
paragraphs: Este caso de estudio se centra en una experiencia de dashboard pensada para transformar datos operativos en algo claro, util y accionable.

media.alt: Imagen principal de un dashboard analitico

en.title: Context
paragraphs: The existing reporting flow made it difficult for teams to identify trends quickly and respond with confidence.

es.title: Contexto
paragraphs: El flujo de reporting existente dificultaba detectar tendencias rapidamente y reaccionar con confianza.

en.title: Approach
paragraphs: We shaped a modular dashboard with better information hierarchy, clearer chart usage, and more useful defaults for ongoing monitoring.

es.title: Enfoque
paragraphs: Se construyo un dashboard modular con mejor jerarquia de informacion, uso mas claro de graficos y defaults mas utiles para monitoreo continuo.

en.title: Outcome
paragraphs: The final product made it easier to track performance, highlight anomalies, and support faster business decisions.

es.title: Resultado
paragraphs: El resultado facilito el seguimiento de performance, la deteccion de anomalias y decisiones de negocio mas rapidas.
